summary: Completed comprehensive testing of Sikkim Monastery Digital Experience platform. All core features working including landing page, navigation, chatbot with AI responses, and voice mode setup. Backend APIs fully functional.

minor_issues.issue: ElevenLabs TTS not generating audio URLs in response
minor_issues.impact: Voice responses not playing audio, but text responses work correctly
minor_issues.workaround: Chat functionality works perfectly without audio

minor_issues.issue: Audio playback not working due to missing audio URLs from backend

passed_tests: Landing page loads with hero, about, gallery, travel tips sections
Header navigation scrolls to correct sections (Discover, Galleries, Travel Guides)
Floating chatbot trigger button visible and clickable
Chat and Voice tabs both functional
Default greeting message from Tenzin displays correctly
User can type messages and receive AI responses from OpenRouter
Voice tab shows avatar and Start Voice Session button
Speak to Tenzin button in header opens chatbot
Hero section buttons work (Explore Monasteries, Meet Tenzin)
6 monastery cards display correctly in gallery
action_item_for_main_agent: Optional: Investigate ElevenLabs TTS configuration if audio responses are required. Check API key validity and rate limits. Current functionality is excellent without audio.
